caption: An older woman with short, curly grey hair and glasses is seated at a desk in an office setting. She is wearing a red collared shirt and is speaking, with her mouth open and expressions changing slightly across the sequence. Behind her is a large window showing green foliage outside, and to her right is a tall, beige metal filing cabinet topped with several folders and organizers. On the desk in front of her, there is a laptop, a stack of papers, and a folder containing a small dark device. To the left of the filing cabinet, a few blue and green bottles are visible on a shelf. The woman remains in a centered position throughout the clip, continuing her speech as the scene remains static except for her facial movements and subtle shifts in posture.
